messages.text: A battle standard snaps overhead and you rally to its colours, striking harder and guarding surer.
{name} rallies to the snapping colours of a battle standard.
The battle standard is furled and its rallying strength fades from you.
The battle standard rallying {name} is furled and its strength fades.
{name} stands rallied beneath a snapping battle standard, striking harder and guarding surer.
